scenarios.starting_prompt: I need extremely detailed care instructions for growing exotic Japanese Bonsai trees in an arid indoor environment.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent for full care instructions, watering schedules, and soil PH guidelines. Follow up by asking about common leaf diseases and pesticide warnings. Over 6 turns, ask for comparisons with outdoor pine care, check if the agent remembers your original arid indoor constraint, and verify whether it starts dropping key instructions.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Please provide the comprehensive installation guide and warranty details for the automated drip irrigation system.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Request the complete step-by-step installation manual for drip irrigation. Ask follow-up questions about water pressure regulators and winterization protocols. In later turns, verify if the agent retains the specific warranty length mentioned early in the conversation.
